_source: Withings API (wbsapi.withings.net) documented response shapes — https://developer.withings.com/api-reference/. All requests are POST form bodies and every response is wrapped in {status, body}. `activity` is POST /v2/measure action=getactivity; `sleep` is POST /v2/sleep action=getsummary; `measures` is POST /measure action=getmeas. Field names + units match the real wire shape: activities[].date YYYY-MM-DD, .active minutes, .totalcalories kcal, .distance meters, .hr_average/.hr_resting bpm; sleep series[].startdate/.enddate UNIX seconds, .data.total_sleep_time/.wakeupduration/.durationtosleep/.lightduration/.deepduration/.remduration seconds; measuregrps[].date UNIX seconds, measures[] {type,value,unit} where the real value = value * 10^unit (type 1=weight, 9=diastolic, 10=systolic, 11=heart rate, 54=spo2, 71=temperature, 73=hrv).
_why: Replayed through syncHealthConnectorData({token:{provider:'withings'}}) so the normalized HealthConnectorSyncPayload (samples + sleepEpisodes) is validated against the real Withings response shape. withings-connector.real.test.ts re-fetches the live API with a token to detect drift from this recording.
